sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 30:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 30:1
items.html: Before the illumination of the line, phase four herself was still not regarded as coarse and low (see item 83). Hence, there is no matter of the degrees being imprinted for her. (Inner Light, Part 1, Chap 1, item 90)
